narrative.context: A supervisor criticizes your work harshly. You draft an angry email reply and your finger hovers over Send.
narrative.prompt: What is the most effective emotion management choice?

options.label: Delay sending; rewrite after cooling down
options.description: Save the draft, take 10 minutes to cool down, then rewrite with specific facts and a request for clarity.

ei.rationale: Prevents impulsive action and redirects emotion into constructive communication—effective management.

options.label: Send a short neutral reply now

ei.rationale: Avoids escalation, but may suppress emotion without processing; still reasonably effective.

options.label: Send the angry email
options.description: Send immediately so they know you’re upset.

ei.rationale: Emotion overrides long-term goals; increases conflict risk.

options.label: Post about it on social media
options.description: Vague-post or name the workplace online.

ei.rationale: Escalates publicly and harms outcomes; poor emotion management.
